positive: A hyper-detailed, stylized minimalist portrait of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) sitting elegantly atop a single, intricately stylized glowing crescent moon. The fox should have magnificent, flowing tails and luminous fur, rendered in a serene, ethereal palette of deep indigo, soft gold, and cosmic purple. The overall composition must be a strong, centralized silhouette against a deep gradient void. Use highly stylized Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetics mixed with modern psychedelic art elements. Extreme contrast is key, emphasizing sharp, graphic outlines and luminous core elements. Designed for clean reproduction on apparel. Intricate patterns should fill negative space subtly. Cinematic, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, poorly drawn
